channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Logitech lance la Mobi Fold : la souris pliable ultra-compacte qui se glisse dans la poche
item.description: Logitech officialise sa première souris pliable, la Mobi Fold. Une souris au design unique, ultra-compacte qui offre en plus une autonomie très confortable pour les travailleurs nomades.

item.title: Comment Windows 11 accélére le lancement de vos applications dans sa dernière mise à jour
item.description: La dernière mise à jour de Windows 11 optimise grandement la réactivité du système grâce à la fonctionnalité Low Latency Profile. Héritée des smartphones, cette optimisation profitera surtout aux machines les plus modestes.

item.title: Avalanche’s desktop fusion reactor delivers blistering-hot plasma
item.description: Fusion power startup Avalanche Energy said its reactor prototype heated a plasma to over 10 million degrees C.

item.title: WhatsApp a 5 jours pour s’ouvrir aux IA concurrentes, Meta risque une amende colossale
item.description: La Commission européenne a donné 5 jours à Meta pour rouvrir WhatsApp aux IA concurrentes. Si l'entreprise ne se plie pas à cette injonction, elle s’expose à des amendes pouvant atteindre 10 % de son chiffre d'affaires annuel.

item.title: Panne de Gemini : l’IA de Google ne donne plus aucun résultat
item.description: Gemini, l'assistant IA de Google, ne fonctionne plus pour de nombreux utilisateurs. Les requêtes n'aboutissent plus et redirigent vers la page d'accueil.

item.title: Clarkson's Farm season 5 episode 5 has finally solved the Richard Ham mystery after 'emotional' pig cliffhanger — and there's a hilarious new connection to Top Gear
item.description: Clarkson's Farm season 5's biggest mystery has been solved as the whereabouts of Richard Ham are revealed — and of course, there's a new Top Gear-themed twist.

item.title: The three sets of earbuds I reach for
item.description: I have been an audio reviewer for 20 years. My time as a freelance headphones panelist at Wirecutter, and the multitude of reviews I’ve written for sites like Reviewed, Digital Trends, IGN, and now The Verge, have given me the chance to listen to hundreds of earbuds. Some were truly excellent, and some were pretty […]

item.title: Vie numérique | Votre propre petit chiro de poche
item.description: Les masseurs à percussion ont quitté le vestiaire des athlètes pour débarquer dans les sous-sols, les bureaux et même les valises des vacanciers. Ils sont devenus un accessoire de récupération aussi banal qu’un tapis de yoga. Est-ce que ça marche vraiment, ou est-ce un gadget de plus appelé à traîner dans le coin de votre maison réservé à l’exercice ?...

item.title: Windows 11's June update is here — these are the 3 most important features, including a huge move to make apps and menus load much faster
item.description: The main addition here is part of Microsoft's drive to make Windows 11 feel much snappier and more responsive all round.

item.title: Valve annonce la disparition prochaine des cartes Steam physiques en magasin
item.description: 14 ans après leur lancement, les cartes cadeaux Steam vont bientôt disparaitre des magasins. En cause : les escroqueries encore bien trop nombreuses, malgré les mesures mises en place par Valve au fil des ans.

item.title: EU orders Meta to stop blocking rival AI chatbots on WhatsApp
item.description: Meta has to open up WhatsApp to third-party AI chatbots again, the European Commission says.

item.title: Google Gemini is down for many —here's what we know about the potential outage so far
item.description: Google Gemini is down for thousands of users today —here's what we know about the potential outage so far.

item.title: Amazon has the Pokémon TCG: First Partner Illustration Collection for under market price
item.description: Amazon has Pokémon TCG First Partner Illustration Collection Series 1 for $67.53, with three promo cards and the option for returns.

item.title: Philips just launched a new ceiling light that looks like a skylight, and I think it looks incredible — but its lack of smart features might not justify its hefty price tag
item.description: Philips is launching an impressive ceiling light that mimics natural daylight, but it doesn't have smart home integration just yet.

item.title: Anthropic spent months saying Mythos was too dangerous to release — then it launched a public version called Fable 5 that it warns ‘comes with risks’
item.description: Anthropic has released a public version of its Mythos model called Fable 5, but acknowledges that it 'comes with risks' despite providing guardrails.

item.title: Beats Studio Buds Plus are on sale for less than $100 at Amazon before Prime Day.
item.description: As of June 10, the Beats Studio Buds + are discounted to $99.95 at Amazon. This is 41% off their list price of $169.95.

item.title: « Cédric Agricole » : l’histoire de la notification se termine avec humour, Cédric n’est pas viré
item.description: Après la drôle de notification « Test cedric » envoyée par erreur par le Crédit Agricole à tous ses clients, la banque fait un peu d'humour avec un jeu de mots tout en rassurant quant au sort de ce fameux Cédric. Sans surprise, d'autres marques s'emparent de ce buzz très français.

item.title: Microsoft breaks Patch Tuesday record with fixes for over 200 security flaws
item.description: AI use is really starting to show and for once, we're happy for it.

item.title: Inconnu en France, ce géant chinois lance un concurrent direct du MacBook Air à 799 euros
item.description: Tecno lance un PC portable à 800 euros qui vise à devenir une alternative au MacBook Air. La marque chinoise a déjà conclu des partenariats avec des distributeurs importants, démontrant son ambition.

item.title: Best iPad Accessories (2026): Keyboards, Cases, Styli
item.description: Kit out your Apple tablet with our favorite stands, cases, keyboards, and styli.

item.title: Doctor Who is on ice for the foreseeable future
item.description: Doctor Who's previously-announced Christmas special is no more as the BBC severs ties with Russell T. Davies and Bad Wolf.

item.title: The Pokémon TCGs 36-pack Chaos Rising Booster Display Box is $15 off on Amazon
item.description: Amazon has the Pokémon TCG Chaos Rising Booster Display Box for $264.88, bringing the 36-pack box to about $7.36 per pack.

item.title: Ninja just gave you a good reason to upgrade your coffee maker, with a new compact version of the Ninja Luxe Café that's perfect for small kitchens
item.description: The Ninja Luxe Café Mini Plus is a semi-automatic espresso machine that offers almost all the same features as its full-size counterparts, for a lower price.

item.title: Traveling to North America for the World Cup? Boost your digital privacy and cut down on roaming fees with this VPN and eSIM combo
item.description: Smart privacy meets affordable data

item.title: En pleine hausse des tarifs, ce SSD externe SanDisk aux couleurs de Peely dans Fortnite offre 2 To pour moins de 200 € (au lieu de 400 €)
item.description: Si les prix des SSD ont plutôt tendance à augmenter en ce moment, celui du SSD externe SanDisk édition Fortnite, lui, baisse. Boulanger l'affiche en effet à 199,99 euros au lieu de 399,99 euros.

item.title: BYD to install thousands of 5-minute EV chargers across Europe
item.description: Chinese EV colossus BYD has announced plans to speed up its conquest of the European auto market with the rollout of superfast Flash Chargers across the continent. BYD has already installed the first new chargers in Germany and the UK, and plans to roll out 3,000 across Europe by the end of next year. At […]

item.title: Xbox exploring ‘radically different’ console business models
item.description: The RAMageddon crisis has got Microsoft rethinking its Xbox console hardware business. Xbox CEO Asha Sharma and Xbox strategy chief Matthew Ball have both revealed this week that Microsoft is reevaluating plans for its next-generation Project Helix console and exploring "radically different" console business models in the meantime. "We are working very hard to rethink […]...

item.title: Budget streaming : pourquoi les Français résilient massivement leurs abonnements en 2026
item.description: Pour la première fois, le budget des Français dédié aux abonnements numériques baisse à 41€ par mois. Netflix résiste, mais la crise du pouvoir d'achat frappe.

item.title: NordVPN's Saily eSIM offers a US phone number for $1 a month
item.description: You now can get a US phone number with NordVPN's Saily eSIM app.

item.title: Best Laptops For College Students (2026): MacBooks and Beyond
item.description: Laptops for college should be portable, offer long battery life, and remain reasonably affordable. Based on testing hundreds of laptops, these are my top picks.

item.title: Roger Bennett says we’re entering the American century of soccer
item.description: America’s most enthusiastic soccer evangelist explains why the 2026 World Cup is a huge moment for his Men in Blazers Media Network. If you asked AI to create someone with the perfect résumé to help popularize the sport of soccer in the U.S., the result would be very close to Roger Bennett.

item.title: SpaceX’s rockets are creating a new air traffic headache for the FAA
item.description: Newly obtained documents show how Starship launches can affect commercial flights across Mexico and the Caribbean. The new space race has given the Federal Aviation Administration a next-generation job: clearing planes out of the way for rocket launches. But as launches become more ambitious and more frequent, protecting aircraft traveling through affected airspace has become an international matter....

item.title: Adidas designed these World Cup jerseys for elite athletes—and clever art buffs
item.description: Belgium’s Red Devils are aspiring to win the title of best dressed on the field. For the 2026 FIFA World Cup, Belgium’s Red Devils are bringing surrealism to the pitch.

item.title: Heading to Europe this summer? Travelers say this new border rule is causing hours-long airport lines
item.description: The EU’s new biometric entry system was designed to speed up border crossings, but some travelers report waits of up to six hours. Many people traveling to Europe this summer may be greeted by lines stretching for hours at popular destinations—and that’s before they even leave the airport.

item.title: Vie numérique | L’identité numérique québécoise existe déjà, et elle a été créée par deux immigrants
item.description: Imaginez avoir toutes vos cartes et tous vos documents officiels dans votre poche. Permis de conduire, carte d’assurance maladie, assurance tout court, passeport, visa, abonnement au gym… en plus de vos clés d’accès en ligne. Tout dans une seule application mobile, sécurisée et inviolable. Ce concept d’identité numérique unifiée commence à prendre forme. Un programmeur russe et son partenaire ukrainien l’ont créée… à Montréal....

item.title: Sonos Sub Mini gets a $100 discount at Amazon ahead of Prime Day
item.description: As of June 10, the Sonos Sub Mini is discounted to $399 at Amazon. This is 20% off its list price of $499.

item.title: Looking for your first real camera? This huge Lumix pre-Prime Day deal is hard to beat — plus top alternatives from Canon, Fujifilm and more
item.description: If you're considering your first real camera, the Lumix G97 is hard to beat, thanks to its excellent handling and wide lens choice, especially for this new low price.

item.title: SpaceX entre en bourse le 12 juin : faut-il acheter l’action la plus chère de l’histoire ?
item.description: Le 12 juin 2026, SpaceX devient l'introduction en bourse la plus chère de l'histoire. Mais à 1 770 milliards de dollars pour une entreprise qui perd de l'argent, vaut-il le coup de mettre la main au portefeuille ?

item.title: SteelSeries Aerox 3 Wireless Gen 2 review: same bones, sharper bite
item.description: The SteelSeries Aerox 3 Wireless Gen 2 is a focused, lightweight wireless gaming mouse that delivers meaningful upgrades over its predecessor.

item.title: AI is reaching finance’s core systems: Here’s what it takes to run it there
item.description: How firms can bridge the gap with virtualized legacy access, governed AI gateways, and AI-native workflows.

item.title: It's time tech professionals had a standard to adhere to
item.description: Tech is shaping the world - but its record on ethics isn't great.

item.title: 'Music is an art of time. Time flows without form': Technics releases a burgundy turntable, ties itself in knots over a matching 1930s lamp collab, we're all confused (but secretly I love it)
item.description: Fritz Hansen and Technics have released 'two objects with distinct origins that, together, form a setting that is considered and deeply human'. Quite.

item.title: La Ford Focus va faire son grand retour sous une forme inattendue
item.description: La Ford Focus fait partie de ces modèles incontournables qui ont été avalés par les SUV. La marque américaine prépare cependant un retour en beauté de la compacte, qui devrait bénéficier de motorisations hybrides. Mais son format pourrait vous surprendre…

item.title: Attention, ChatGPT peut vous recommander des sites d’arnaques
item.description: ChatGPT a intégré des liens vers des sites marchands frauduleux dans ses résultats de recherche en ligne. Les pirates sont parvenus à subtiliser l'argent et les coordonnées bancaires de certains utilisateurs.

item.title: ‘Rust-out’ is the new burnout, and it requires a different fix
item.description: Here’s what to do. The sleds are loaded. The dogs are lunging at the lines, barking with edgy anticipation. We release the snub line, rock the sled forward, and call out: “Ready dogs—let’s go!” The barking stops instantly. Nothing but runners hissing on packed snow. Dogs in sync. Partners in rhythm. Sled perfectly balanced.

item.title: What is the release date for Rick and Morty season 9 episode 4 on Adult Swim, HBO Max, and Hulu?
item.description: With a title suggesting that a Robert Redford tribute is on the cards, I've no idea what to expect. But, when is Rick and Morty season 9 episode 4 coming to a streaming platform near you?

item.title: e.l.f. Beauty CEO Tarang Amin: What helping run my father’s motel taught me about risk
item.description: A small motel. A big risk. A lifetime of lessons. My first job taught me three lessons that have stayed with me ever since: how you treat people matters, the power of conversation, and the importance of taking risks. These lessons began when I was 14 and my family bought and ran a motel together in Alexandria, Virginia.

item.title: Ce moniteur gaming de 34 pouces perd 33 % de son prix : l’écran parfait pour jouer en ultra-large sans se ruiner
item.description: Envie d'un écran PC ultra-large sans vider votre compte en banque ? Le moniteur gamer Asus TUF Gaming VG34VQEL1A s'affiche aujourd'hui à seulement 189 euros au lieu de 299 euros.
